items.title: Gradient boosting training loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  start["initial prediction F0"]
  grad["compute pseudo-residuals"]
  tree["fit shallow tree to residuals"]
  update["F <- F + eta * tree"]
  check{"more rounds?"}
  done["ensemble F"]
  start --> grad --> tree --> update --> check
  check -->|yes| grad
  check -->|no| done
items.caption: Shared GBDT skeleton — algorithm details in Gradient Boosting; XGBoost/LightGBM optimize tree fitting inside each round.

items.title: Histogram-based split finding
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["continuous feature values"]
  bin["bin into B buckets"]
  stats["aggregate grad/Hess per bin"]
  split["evaluate splits at bin edges only"]
  pick["choose best split"]
  raw --> bin --> stats --> split --> pick
items.caption: Canonical histogram workflow — reduces candidates from O(unique values) to O(bins).

items.title: Level-wise vs leaf-wise growth
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  lw_title["Level-wise XGBoost-style"]
  l1["split all leaves at depth 1"]
  l2["split all leaves at depth 2"]
  lf_title["Leaf-wise LightGBM-style"]
  f1["pick leaf with max gain"]
  f2["split that leaf only"]
  f3["repeat on new best leaf"]
  lw_title --> l1 --> l2
  lf_title --> f1 --> f2 --> f3
items.caption: Level-wise grows balanced layers; leaf-wise prioritizes the single highest-gain expansion.

items.title: Missing value default direction
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  node["internal split node"]
  present["value present: go left or right by threshold"]
  missing["value missing: learned default branch"]
  node --> present
  node --> missing
items.caption: Both libraries learn where missing entries go at each split — distinct from upfront imputation.
